channel.title: Bill Ackman — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q4 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Doubling down on the Nike turnaround thesis.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q4 2025 · 10.4% of portfolio. Building Brookfield position.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED UBER (+35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added UBER in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Heavy add on the autonomous vehicle optionality.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED HHH (-4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed HHH in Q4 2025 · 12.7% of portfolio. Small trim on Howard Hughes.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED AMZN (+65%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 14.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION META (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position META (META PLATFORMS INC) in Q4 2025 · 11.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED GOOGL (-86%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q4 2025 · 1.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: EXITED CMG (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) exited CMG (CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION UBER · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position UBER in Q3 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio. Entered Uber on AV optionality.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q3 2025 · 9.5% of portfolio. Building Brookfield.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+22%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q3 2025 · 5.3% of portfolio. Nike turnaround thesis — first big add.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED CMG (-6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed CMG in Q3 2025 · 21.4% of portfolio. Small Chipotle trim after 2024 gains.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED GOOGL (-10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q3 2025 · 8.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+18%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q2 2025 · 4.5% of portfolio. First major Nike add — 3 consecutive quarters building.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED HHH (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added HHH in Q2 2025 · 13.8% of portfolio. Building Howard Hughes.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+12%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q2 2025 · 8.7% of portfolio. Continuing to build Brookfield.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION AMZN (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q2 2025 · 9.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED GOOGL (+21%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q2 2025 · 6.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION NKE · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position NKE in Q1 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Ackman's first Nike position.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+8%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q1 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Building Brookfield.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION UBER (+100%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position UBER (UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC) in Q1 2025 · 18.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED CMG (-13%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed CMG (CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL INC) in Q1 2025 · 9.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED GOOG (-16%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q1 2025 · 8.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED GOOGL (+11%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q1 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED HLT (-45%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed HLT (HILTON WORLDWIDE HLDGS INC) in Q1 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION HTZ (+100%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position HTZ (HERTZ GLOBAL HLDGS INC) in Q1 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED NKE (+18%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added NKE in Q4 2024 · 4.0% of portfolio. Doubling on Nike turnaround.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+12%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q4 2024 · 8.4% of portfolio. Building Brookfield.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED HHH (+6%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added HHH in Q4 2024 · 13.0% of portfolio. More Howard Hughes.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED CMG (-14%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed CMG (CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL INC) in Q4 2024 · 11.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED HLT (-26%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed HLT (HILTON WORLDWIDE HLDGS INC) in Q4 2024 · 10.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED SEA (+20%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added SEA (SEAPORT ENTMT GROUP INC) in Q4 2024 · 1.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION NKE · Q3 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position NKE in Q3 2024 · 3.0% of portfolio. Ackman's debut Nike position.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+13%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q3 2024 · 7.5% of portfolio. Brookfield add.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED HHH (+8%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added HHH in Q3 2024 · 12.3% of portfolio. Howard Hughes add.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED HLT (-18%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed HLT (HILTON WORLDWIDE HLDGS INC) in Q3 2024 · 13.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: NEW POSITION SEA (+100%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) new position SEA (SEAPORT ENTMT GROUP INC) in Q3 2024 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+8%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q2 2024 · 6.6% of portfolio. Building Brookfield.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED CMG (-4%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed CMG in Q2 2024 · 22.5% of portfolio. Small CMG trim after gains.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED GOOG (-20%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q2 2024 · 13.3% of portfolio.
